title: Join our Mailing List - Canada.ca
content:
## Join our Mailing List
To subscribe, submit an email to analytical_methods-subscribe-request@list.hc-sc.gc.ca with the email subject containing only the text " Subscribe ".
You will receive a confirmation e-mail from Analytical Methods. You must reply to this confirmation e-mail in order to activate your subscription.

## Cancelling your subscription
If you are already a subscriber and wish to cancel, submit an email to analytical_methods-unsubscribe-request@list.hc-sc.gc.ca with the email subject containing only the text " Unsubscribe ".
You will receive a confirmation e-mail from Analytical Methods.
Note : If you're having problems subscribing or unsubscribing, contact mmc-cmm@hc-sc.gc.ca .
